title: CompositeDigester: add the ability to filter tar streams
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Rework `CompositeDigester` so that it can handle type "".  Add a `newTarFilterer()` inspired by imagebuilder's, that we'll be able to use to adjust headers before digesting them, though that'll be done in a future change.

#### How to verify it

For now, existing tests should continue to succeed.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

This changes the content digest that we compute and add to image history for directories, so this is a dividing line of sorts in that cache evaluation with newer versions will not always match images built with versions of buildah which do not include this change.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```
The hash values generated for ADD and COPY instructions in image histories will be different, and this will cause multi-layer builds (builds run with `--layers`) to not use intermediate images which were built with versions that do not include this change.
```

comments.body:
It LGTM, but would really like a @vrothberg review before merging.
Thanks for the mini function @nalind!
